name: Prefabricated Houses
description:
SAMAN is a prefabricated house manufacturer in India that builds two very different things in the same factory: homes for people who want to skip months of brick-and-mortar construction, and site units — offices and worker accommodation — that arrive ready to use the week a project needs them. The range starts at ₹2,15,000 for a panel site office and runs to ₹16,25,000 for a full residential home. The sections below map each unit to the buyer it was built for; if you already know you want the flagship, browse our prefabricated house line directly.

What types of prefabricated houses does SAMAN manufacture?

SAMAN manufactures four kinds of prefabricated structure: full residential homes, cabin-style homes built to live in year-round, prefab site offices for construction projects, and worker bunkhouses. Every unit is factory-built and delivered whole to your plot or site — no on-site construction, and no waiting months for a foundation to cure before you can use it.

Which prefabricated house do you need?

The right unit comes down to who will use it and for how long. For a permanent home, the full prefabricated home (₹16,25,000) is our largest residential build; for something smaller and more affordable that still lives like a house, a cabin-style home (₹2,56,000) or a relocatable porta-cabin home (₹3,65,000) sits comfortably on a plot, farm or terrace. For a construction site office, our signature SAMAN office cabin (₹2,25,000) is the 20×20 ft unit most buyers start with, while a panel-built site office (₹2,15,000) is the lowest-cost entry point. To house a crew on site, a single bunkhouse unit (₹4,55,000) sleeps one team and a larger multi-bed bunkhouse (₹4,55,000) is built for bigger teams across these models. If it is the shipping-container look you are after rather than a panel-built house, our container home range is a separate line.

Compare the SAMAN prefabricated house range

Here is how the range compares unit by unit — useful when you are weighing prefabricated house companies against each other on price and purpose:
Unit Built for Starting price Why pick it
Prefabricated House Permanent residential ₹16,25,000 Our largest factory-built home
Porta Cabin House Residential ₹3,65,000 A relocatable home for a plot or farm
Portable Cabin House Residential ₹2,56,000 The affordable cabin-style home
SAMAN Prefab Office Site office ₹2,25,000 Signature 20×20 ft office cabin
Prefab Site Office Site office ₹2,15,000 Lowest-cost panel site office
Prefabricated Bunkhouse Worker housing ₹4,55,000 A larger crew, multi-bed
Bunkhouse Cabin Worker housing ₹4,55,000 One crew in a single unit
Prices are the current starting figures for each unit; final cost depends on size and customisation.

Buying your prefab house direct from the manufacturer

Every prefabricated house for sale on this page is built in-house — SAMAN is the manufacturer, not a reseller fronting other builders. We fabricate the full range across two manufacturing units, one in Bengaluru and one in Greater Noida, which is what lets us quality-check each unit before it leaves and deliver it whole to your site. Because the structures are panel- and frame-built rather than poured on site, they are relocatable between projects and customisable in colour and internal layout without starting from scratch. That combination — own factories, delivered-whole units, no on-site construction — is the practical difference between buying from us and buying from a company that sub-contracts the build.

Prefabricated house FAQs

Which prefab unit suits a home versus a construction site?

Homes — the full prefabricated home, porta-cabin house and cabin-style house — are finished for year-round living. Site units — the SAMAN office cabin, panel site office and the two bunkhouses — are built for fast deployment and reuse across projects. The routing map above matches yours.

What is SAMAN's price range for prefabricated houses?

From ₹2,15,000 for a panel site office to ₹16,25,000 for a full residential home, with site offices and bunkhouses sitting between ₹2.15 and ₹4.55 lakh. These are starting prices; size and customisation move the final figure.

How do I buy a prefabricated house from SAMAN?

Send a quote request with your use-case and preferred size to either factory below. We confirm the configuration and price, build the unit, and deliver it whole to your site.

How long does a SAMAN prefabricated house last?

The MS-frame and panel structures are built for long service with normal upkeep. The steel frame and weatherproof panels — not the speed of the build — are what determine how long the unit lasts.

Can the units be relocated or customised?

Yes. Because they are factory-built rather than site-poured, units can be relocated between sites, and colour and internal layout are customisable before dispatch.

Get a prefabricated house quote

Tell us your use-case and site location and we will send a configured price. Bangalore — Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859 Delhi NCR — Call +91 87960 39938 · WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
